[Adopted 6-2-1997 by Ord. No. 437; amended 3-10-2008 by Ord. No. 531]
For the purposes of this chapter, Millersville Borough is hereby divided into the following zoning districts:
R-1 Low-Density Residential District
R-2 Medium-Density Residential District
R-3 High-Density Residential District
C-1 Neighborhood Commercial District
C-2 General Commercial District
MU Mixed-Use District
I Industrial District
Each district is established in order to encourage the most appropriate use of land throughout the Borough.
The regulations set by this chapter within each district shall be minimum regulations and shall apply uniformly to each class or kind of structure or land, and particularly, except as hereinafter provided:
A. No building, structure or land shall hereafter be used or occupied, and no building or part thereof shall be erected, moved or altered unless in conformity with all of the regulations herein specified for the district in which it is located.
B. No building or other structure shall hereafter be erected or altered to exceed the height, to accommodate or house a greater number of families or occupy a smaller lot area per family, to have narrower or smaller rear yards, front yards, side yards or other open spaces than herein required, or in any other manner contrary to the provisions of this chapter.
[Amended 9-25-2023 by Ord. No. 598]
The dimensional requirements for each zoning district are as follows:
DistrictMin. Lot Area (sq ft)Min. Lot Width (ft)Max. Building Height (ft)Min. Front Yard (ft)Min. Side Yard (ft)Min. Rear Yard (ft)
R-17,500603525830
R-25,000503520525
R-33,500354015420
C-15,000504510515
C-210,000805010010
MU3,00030505010
I20,00010060251525
